snapshot.description: All four storylines (Zix, Brix, Pip, Carta) have dialogue that is too long, overly self-referential, relies on accumulated narrative context, and doesn't clearly communicate what the player needs to do. Briefings, updates, and resolutions should be short, grounded in the science task, and stand alone without reading previous chapters.
snapshot.title: Rewrite all mission dialogue — shorter, task-focused, no narrative in-jokes

newValue.text: No dialogue references events from previous chapters (each beat stands alone)
Character voice is present but not dependent on personality quirks built up over multiple chapters
Postcards/titles updated to match new tone
